entry.text: The pharmacy's plate glass is long gone, replaced by a curtain of grime-stiff plastic sheeting. Inside, ransacked shelves cast long shadows across a floor slick with burst blister packs and broken glass. Something moves near the back counter — a shape too deliberate to be debris settling.

choices.label: Push through the shelves to the dispensary
Circle around to the rear delivery door

dispensary.text: The dispensary cage is still padlocked — someone welded it shut after the fall, sealing whatever was left inside. A rusted bolt-cutter hangs on a hook nearby, almost like an invitation. The shape you heard earlier is gone, leaving only a smear of dark matter on the linoleum.

choices.label: Force the cage with the bolt-cutter

stockroom.text: The stockroom is a {{find}} — sealed cases of expired medication, a cold-locker that somehow held its seal, and a handwritten inventory from someone who thought they'd return. They didn't. You work fast, packing what your body can carry before the silence starts feeling deliberate again.

shelf_collapse.text: A metal shelving unit groans and topples as you push past it. It catches you across the shoulders, driving you into the broken glass below.

ambush_outside.text: A feral dog pack was sheltering in the alley. You take a bad bite before you can drive them off with your pack.

cage_trap.text: The bolt-cutter snaps a trip-wire someone rigged across the cage door. A battery-powered alarm screams to life — every scavenger within two blocks now knows you are here. You grab what you can and run.

glass_cut.text: A carelessly stacked tray of ampoules tips and shatters. The shards open a deep gash across your forearm before you can pull back.
